ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the code repository for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_spent" REAL /* Actual amount spent on the project */,
  "client" TEXT /* Name of the client or organization for which the project is being developed */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of developers assigned to the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., web application, mobile app, backend service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity record */,
  "project_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first project */,
  "project_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second project */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two projects */,
  "similarity_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the similarity score (e.g., shared codebase, similar functionality) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the similarity score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_similarity_project_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("project_id_2") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_similarity_project_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("project_id_1") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., lead developer, junior developer) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the developer was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the developer left the company (if applicable) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Developer's areas of expertise (e.g., Java, Python, DevOps) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_developers" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the developer was assigned to the project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Specific role of the developer in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "estimated_effort" REAL /* Estimated effort (in hours) the developer will contribute to the project */,
  "actual_effort" REAL /* Actual effort (in hours) the developer has contributed to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_developers_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_developers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the milestone */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Completion date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., pending, completed, overdue) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the milestone */,
  "actual_spent" REAL /* Actual amount spent on the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the milestone */,
  "responsible_developer" INTEGER /* ID of the developer responsible for the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_responsible_developer FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_developer") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Completion date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, completed, in progress) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "estimated_effort" REAL /* Estimated effort (in hours) to complete the task */,
  "actual_effort" REAL /* Actual effort (in hours) spent on the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_summary" TEXT /* Summary of how the issue was resolved */,
  "estimated_resolution_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time (in hours) to resolve the issue */,
  "actual_resolution_time" INTEGER /* Actual time (in hours) spent resolving the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Current branch of the repository */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit to the repository */,
  "last_pull_request_date" TEXT /* Date of the last pull request */,
  "pull_request_count" INTEGER /* Total number of pull requests made in the repository */,
  "code_quality_score" REAL /* Code quality score based on static analysis tools */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "committed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., feature, bug fix, documentation) */,
  "commit_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the commit (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_committed_by FOREIGN KEY ("committed_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code file */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the code file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the code file in bytes */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  "code_complexity" REAL /* Code complexity score based on static analysis tools */,
  "code_quality_score" REAL /* Code quality score based on static analysis tools */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_files_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., issue, task) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, suggestion, update) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., status change, milestone update) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Old status of the project */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "responsible_developer" INTEGER /* ID of the developer responsible for the event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the project (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_responsible_developer FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_developer") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
